Checkout.heading: Complete your booking
Checkout.payInstructions: Choose PayPal or pay with a card — your card is never seen by our servers.

Checkout.captureError: Payment was approved but we couldn't confirm your booking. Don't worry — your card was charged at most once. Please reach out and we'll resolve it manually.

CheckoutSuccess.heading: You're booked.
CheckoutSuccess.body: Your payment was received and a confirmation email is on its way. I'll be in touch within one business day to set up our session — keep an eye on your inbox.
nextItems: A confirmation email with everything you'll need
A short questionnaire to help me prepare
A calendar invite once we've agreed on a time
CheckoutSuccess.pendingBody: We're confirming your payment with PayPal. Refresh this page in a moment — or check the email I'll send once it's complete.
CheckoutSuccess.notFoundBody: We couldn't find that order. If you completed a payment and don't have a confirmation, please get in touch and we'll look into it.

CheckoutCancel.metaDescription: Your payment was cancelled and no charge was made.
CheckoutCancel.heading: No worries — nothing was charged.
CheckoutCancel.body: Your payment was cancelled and no charge was made to your account. Whenever you're ready, you can pick up where you left off, or reach out if you have questions.

Author.name: Ibukun Aliu
Author.title: Career Restart Coach
Author.shortBio: I help people — especially moms — return to the workforce with renewed purpose, practical strategy, and unshakeable confidence.

bio.p1: My name is Ibukun Aliu, and I am a Career Restart Coach.
bio.p2: With a background in Psychology and Human Resource Management, and a career in Talent Acquisition, I've spent years understanding people, potential, and the power of the right opportunity.
bio.p3: My passion for career restarts is deeply personal. I've walked this road myself. I know what it feels like to step back into the workforce after a break — the uncertainty, the self-doubt, the desire for clarity, and the hope for a fresh start. With the right support, that journey can become transformative.
bio.p4: One group especially close to my heart is women — particularly moms — who are ready to restart or pivot their careers. I understand the courage it takes to return, and I'm committed to making that transition easier, clearer, and more empowering.

vision.label: Vision
vision.title: Be a mindset shifter.
vision.body: Helping people shed fear and doubt, embrace their true selves, and confidently restart their careers.

mission.label: Mission
mission.title: Build a community that lifts you back up.
mission.body: Mentoring professionals through their return-to-work journey, building a supportive community, and sharing my story through writing and thought leadership.

message.label: Message
message.title: I restarted my career, and so can you.
message.body: With new skills, confidence, and resilience, you can build the future you desire. If you're willing to learn, grow, and step forward with courage, your restart is absolutely possible.

Author.ctaQuote: You're not starting from scratch — you're starting from experience.
Author.ctaFollow: Let's build your next chapter together.

miriam.name: Miriam
miriam.body: I recently worked with Ibukun Aliu for interview preparation, and the experience was truly invaluable. Our full interview simulation felt realistic and highlighted exactly where I needed to improve. Her Talent Acquisition expertise came through in the clear, actionable feedback she provided, helping me refine both my delivery and confidence. I felt significantly more prepared thanks to her guidance. I highly recommend her to anyone looking to elevate their career.

hannah.name: Hannah
hannah.body: I sought out Ibukun because I needed clarity on how to make a meaningful negotiation and decision between two offers. Ibukun listened carefully and responded with calm confidence. One statement stayed with me: “We don’t have because we do not ask.” She encouraged me to be clear and direct about what I wanted, to communicate transparently that I was considering another opportunity, and to articulate why I was genuinely interested in working with this employer. I followed her advice and wrote to the employer, clearly outlining my expectations. To my surprise and gratitude, every point I raised was addressed positively. The outcome exceeded my expectations.

patricia.name: Patricia
patricia.context: Restarting after a move to Germany
patricia.body: After moving to Germany, I struggled to restart my career while still learning the language. Despite ten years of experience, I felt like a junior again. Working with Ibukun changed everything. She reviewed my CV, prepared me with a German mock interview, and helped me recognise the value of my expertise beyond language barriers. Even after I secured a job, she continued to check in and support my progress. I highly recommend her to anyone restarting their career.

clarity-session.title: Clarity Session
clarity-session.shortBlurb: A focused, one-to-one session designed to help you gain direction, understand your next steps, and move forward with confidence.
description: Sometimes, feeling stuck in you career is not caused by a lack of options — it's a lack of clarity about which option matches who you actually are right now. We spend the time cutting through that.
You bring the situation: a return after a break, a pivot you're weighing, an offer on the table, or a vague sense that you're drifting. We end with a written one-page plan you can act on this week.
outcomes: A clear read on what's actually driving your dissatisfaction or ambition
A written summary delivered within 24 hours
forWhom: Anyone weighing a return, a pivot, or a hard career decision and needing structured thinking — fast.

restart-framework-workshop.title: Restart Framework Workshop
restart-framework-workshop.shortBlurb: A practical, supportive workshop that walks you through the essential steps of restarting your career — from mindset to strategy to action.
description: Three hours, two sessions, one shared goal: turning a career restart from a fuzzy intention into a real plan. We work through the Restart Framework I've developed working with returners, and you leave with a draft plan and a small cohort of women doing the same work.
Format: short teaching segments on mindset, positioning, and action; paired exercises; and live coaching of two volunteer participants.
outcomes: A repeatable framework for evaluating future moves
Connections with others on the same journey
forWhom: Professionals who are mid-restart and learn best with others in the room

interview-prep.title: Interview Prep
interview-prep.shortBlurb: A mock interview session with targeted questions and feedback to set you up for success in your next interview.
description: We run a realistic mock interview tailored to the role you're targeting — behavioral, role-specific, or both. I take notes the whole way through, and we close with detailed, actionable feedback drawn from years inside Talent Acquisition.
You leave knowing exactly where you're strong, where you're losing the room, and how to fix it before your real interview.
outcomes: A realistic mock interview tailored to your target role
Specific, actionable feedback on content, structure, and delivery
A sharpened answer to the questions you tend to fumble
forWhom: Anyone with an interview on the calendar in the next six weeks.

cv-review.title: CV Review & Positioning
cv-review.shortBlurb: A 30 minute call to understand your areas of interest and a professional review of your CV with tailored recommendations, updated wording for key sections, and one round of edits.
description: Your CV gets read in under thirty seconds. I rewrite it to survive that and earn the second read — repositioning your experience around the value you actually create, not just the tasks you've done.
You send me your current CV and the kind of role you're targeting. I return tailored recommendations, updated wording for your key sections, and one round of edits to incorporate your feedback.
forWhom: Anyone whose CV needs to make the case for a new chapter.
If you’re preparing for your next step and want your CV to reflect who you are today — not who you were years ago — this service is for you.

test-50.title: Production test (€0.50)
test-50.shortBlurb: Internal end-to-end payment test — not a real service.
description: This service exists only to verify the live payment flow with a small real charge. If you've reached this page outside of an internal test, please ignore it and head back to the main services.
